name: defaultReasoning
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.instanceClass === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || (output.result.resolvedProperties && typeof output.result.resolvedProperties === 'object')
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (registerLensAction). Dispatch key 'commonsense.defaultReasoning'. The page.tsx inline 'Commonsense Actions' panel drives this via useRunArtifact (stored-artifact path); its render reads {instanceClass,inheritanceChain,resolvedProperties,propertySources,totalProperties,conflicts:{inheritanceOverrides,siblingConflicts},warnings,cycles} — verified aligned both directions (no rename needed). Non-monotonic default-inheritance: walks chain most-general→most-specific so the most specific value wins (bird legs:2 over animal legs:4), overrides beat defaults, instance props beat all; diamond/sibling conflict detection + cycle detection (no infinite loop). Empty hierarchy → {message}. Not assassin-driven (no derived contract for this LENS_ACTION); authored spec pinned by server/tests/commonsense-lens-macros.test.js.
